heading: Immediate Disaster Assistance program
label: 657n Immediate Disaster Assistance program
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Effective DateEnactment of this section and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under , Agriculture.Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of Title 7May 22, 2008

children.heading: Program required
children.label: a Program required
children.text: The Administrator shall carry out a program, to be known as the Immediate Disaster Assistance program, under which the Administration participates on a deferred (guaranteed) basis in 85 percent of the balance of the financing outstanding at the time of disbursement of the loan if such balance is less than or equal to $25,000 for businesses affected by a disaster.

children.heading: Eligibility requirement
children.label: b Eligibility requirement
children.text: To receive a loan guaranteed under subsection (a), the applicant shall also apply for, and meet basic eligibility standards for, a loan under subsection (b) or (c) of .section 636 of this title

children.heading: Use of proceeds
children.label: c Use of proceeds
children.text: A person who receives a loan under subsection (b) or (c) of shall use the proceeds of that loan to repay all loans guaranteed under subsection (a), if any, before using the proceeds for any other purpose.section 636 of this title

children.heading: No prepayment penalty
children.label: 1 No prepayment penalty
children.text: There shall be no prepayment penalty on a loan guaranteed under subsection (a).

children.heading: Repayment
children.label: 2 Repayment
children.text: A person who receives a loan guaranteed under subsection (a) and who is disapproved for a loan under subsection (b) or (c) of , as the case may be, shall repay the loan guaranteed under subsection (a) not later than the date established by the Administrator, which may not be earlier than 10 years after the date on which the loan guaranteed under subsection is disbursed.section 636 of this title1So in original. Probably should be “subsection (a)”.1

children.heading: Approval or disapproval
children.label: e Approval or disapproval
children.text: The Administrator shall ensure that each applicant for a loan under the program receives a decision approving or disapproving of the application within 36 hours after the Administration receives the application.
